title: Norwegian Lamb Kebabs with Briny Glaze
description: A flavorful and savory dish, perfect for a summer evening or a special occasion. The combination of lamb and briny glaze creates a unique and unforgettable taste experience.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch pieces
ingredients.notes: Make sure the lamb is at room temperature before cooking

ingredients.name: Xenial olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality olive oil for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Norwegian kebab seasoning
ingredients.notes: You can adjust the amount of seasoning to your liking

ingredients.name: Briny glaze (see below)
ingredients.notes: You can adjust the amount of glaze to your liking

ingredients.name: Chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Use fresh parsley for the best flavor

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, combine the lamb, olive oil, and kebab seasoning. Toss to coat the lamb evenly.
Thread the lamb pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
While the kebabs are cooking, prepare the briny glaze (see below).
Once the kebabs are cooked, brush them with the briny glaze.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
